description:
Join us on Wednesday, April 29, from 4 - 7 PM at Whispering Vine - South Creek for a tasting featuring Caymus.

Tasting Fee: $35 per person (Buy a tasting bottle and the tasting fee is refunded.)

Featured Wines:

  • Caymus-Suisun Grand Durif 2021 – $44.99 – This Suisun Valley Durif shows dense dark fruit, cracked pepper, and a savory edge that keeps the wine lifted instead of heavy.
  • Round Pond Kith & Kin Cabernet Sauvignon 2022 – undefined undefined, undefined undefined – The nose opens with bright red cherry, cranberry, and a touch of allspice.
  • Leviathan Red Wine 2022 – undefined undefined – This red blend is dark, polished, and broad on the palate, bringing together black cherry, cassis, plum, and baking spice with a streak of freshness underneath.
  • The Calling Russian River Pinot Noir 2023 – undefined undefined – Bing cherry, wild strawberry, red plum, and a little clove and nutmeg lead the nose.
  • Hartford Court Russian River Chardonnay 2024 – $26.99 – This Chardonnay opens with citrus, crisp green apple, nectarine, and a little tropical lift.

Come explore Caymus Wines and find your favorite bottle. Buy a bottle from the tasting and your fee is refunded.
title: Caymus Tasting
